analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5th Edition mechanics for Cleric Domain features. It clearly defines how domain spells are acquired and managed.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is concise, mechanically precise, and addresses key edge cases (spell preparation count, spell access if not on the standard list).

mechanics.core_mechanic: Automatic preparation and exemption from the daily spell preparation limit for domain-specific spells.
mechanics.trigger: Gaining a specific Cleric level corresponding to the domain progression.
mechanics.impact: Significantly enhances the thematic power and spell flexibility of the Cleric subclass by granting permanent, bonus spells.

suggestions: Ensure that the corresponding domain descriptions clearly list the required levels for spell acquisition, as this feature text references them.
The reference to "[cleric spell list](#section-cleric-spells)" is a hyperlink marker; verify that the target document/section exists and is correctly linked in the final publication format.
